name: Sales Report (Limited)
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can access sales performance data without viewing sensitive cost and profitability information by using the Sales Report Limited version, which provides revenue and unit sales metrics while hiding cost prices and gross profit margins. This restricted reporting helps retail operators share sales performance with staff members who need transaction data but shouldn't access confidential pricing information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the Sales Report Limited helps retail operators maintain appropriate information security while still providing sales team members with performance metrics they need to understand sales results and customer purchasing trends."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Sales Report (Limited) is a reduced version of the "}, {"text": "Sales Report."}, {"text": " This report is recommended to be used when you want staff to access the Sales Report, but don't wish for them to view Cost or GP information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use the Sales Report as a supplement to the"}, {"text": " Stock Value Vs Sales Report"}, {"text": " when more detail is required, or in conjunction with the "}, {"text": "Income Report"}, {"text": " when investigating cash discrepancies."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This report should not be used as a single reference for overall sales information but in conjunction with the Stock Value vs Sales Report."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using the Sales Report (Limited)"}], "data-id": "using-the-sales-report-limited"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Sales Report (Limited):"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Sales Reports > Sales Report (Limited)", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields and "}, {"text": "Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " as required (see below for detailed information)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To "}, {"text": "Export ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the report click either the XML or CSV buttons in the top right-hand corner"}]}]}]}, {"type":
